hero.sub: QR galleries, digital invitations, seating charts and a digital menu with ordering — all in one place, no apps, no hassle.
hero.trustedBy: Trusted by couples, organizers and venues across Bosnia

gallery.name: Event gallery
gallery.desc: Guests scan a QR code and upload photos with no app and no sign-up. Every memory from your event, automatically in one place.

invites.name: Digital invitations
invites.desc: An elegant invitation with an envelope-opening animation, countdown and RSVP system. Always know who is coming.

seating.name: Seating chart
seating.desc: Guests type their name and instantly find their table. No crowd at the entrance, no printed plans.

menu.name: Digital menu + ordering
menu.desc: A guest scans the QR, browses the menu, adds to cart and orders — the waiter gets the order instantly, with a sound notification.

how.title: A perfect event in a few steps
how.s1d: We agree on the package that fits you.
how.s2d: Gallery, invitation or menu — ready the same day.
how.s4d: Everything runs itself — you focus on your guests.

testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.q1: By the end of the evening we had over 300 photos from guests — without organizing anything. Every memory saved.
testimonials.q2: The digital menu cut our waiting times in half. Guests order from the table, we just confirm — the order arrives with a sound, nothing gets missed.
testimonials.q3: The envelope-animation invitation delighted every guest. The RSVP list saved us dozens of phone calls.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: Do guests need to install an app?
faq.a1: No. Guests scan the QR code with their phone camera and do everything in the browser — photo uploads, RSVP, ordering.
faq.q2: How does ordering work in a café?
faq.a2: A guest scans the QR code, browses the menu, adds items to the cart, types their table number and submits. Staff instantly receive the order on their panel, with a sound notification, and confirm it in one click.
faq.q3: Can I control which photos are shown?
faq.a3: Yes. You can enable manual moderation — guest photos then wait for your approval before becoming visible in the gallery.
faq.q4: How long are the photos available?
faq.a4: The gallery stays available for 12 months after the event, and you can download all photos in full resolution as a ZIP at any time.

contact.title: Ready for your special day?
contact.sub: Reach out — we reply the same day.

landing.manifesto: One QR code turns every phone into a camera, an invitation, a waiter and a memory. No apps. No waiting. No missed moments.
